title: E-Commerce Platform
desc: Multi-tenant online store with SSR frontend, admin API, Stripe payments and background jobs for order sync.

title: Company Management System
desc: Realtime dashboard with RBAC, invoices and analytics. React frontend, Node APIs, Postgres, WebSockets.

title: Multi-Vendor Marketplace
desc: Sellers, commissions, product catalog and order routing. Focus on onboarding and payout flows.

title: Booking & Reservation System
desc: Hotel & apartment booking with calendar, reviews, and payments.
